response.overview: # Translation  It tells the story of Iris Nur (Ezzanie Jasny), a 'diva' woman who had a dispute with Inspector Ebrahim (MK K-Clique) when her attempt to escape a reckless driving summons failed. Iris did not expect that she would meet Inspector Ebrahim again, who was appointed as the Suksis Corps Coordination Officer at her university. Later, Iris cut off contact with Inspector Ebrahim after the end of the Suksis Corps certificate presentation ceremony. Iris wants to turn over a new leaf by joining a humanitarian mission in Ijora. Without the knowledge of others, Iris actually has another agenda. Iris also did not expect that her life would change after meeting Firman there. Firman is hired by Iris's father as Iris's personal bodyguard. Who is Firman really and what will happen between the two of them?
response.title: I Love You Stupid
